PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-31-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Loren Lopin for Chanetta Jackson and Shedra Jackson.
Raoul Jackson in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that today was the day by which something was supposed to be filed and that nothing has been filed. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (order signed in open Court). Bond in the amount of $880,000.00 is required. Status on close of the Estate is set for July 31, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Lopin stated that he is not sure if Shedra can be bonded.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Duong. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-17-2017 Continued To Jan-31-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Loren Lopin for Petitioners Shedra Jackson and Chanetta Jackson.
Raoul Jackson in Propria Persona.

Mr. Jackson stated that he is still planning to object, that he spoke with Attorney Ms. Zulaica on Friday, that he did not know why she was not present and that he will call her today. Mr. Lopin stated that he has met with Mr. Jackson and tried to work things out. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to January 31, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for one final continuance for filing of either objections or a competing petition, or the Court will grant this petition at that time.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Duong. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-03-2017 Continued To Jan-17-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Raoul Jackson in Propria Persona.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Mr. Jackson requested a continuance to hire an attorney and to file a petition to be appointed. The petition for letters of administration is continued to January 17, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Clerk will notify Attorney Lorin Lopin.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-05-2016 Continued To Jan-03-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
